seoTitle: How to Fix Slack Notifications Not Working
metaDescription: Troubleshoot broken Slack notifications by checking preferences, do not disturb settings, system permissions, and the app cache.
intro: Missing an urgent ping because of misconfigured Slack notifications can disrupt your whole workflow. This guide walks through the common causes, from in-app preferences to system-level permissions, and the fixes for each.

steps.heading: Check your notification preferences
steps.body: Open Preferences, go to Notifications, and confirm 'Notify me about' is set to All New Messages or Mentions as needed.

steps.heading: Review your notification schedule
steps.body: Make sure your set working hours or a lingering Do Not Disturb rule isn't silently blocking alerts.

steps.heading: Check channel-specific mutes
steps.body: Verify that the channel you're missing alerts from hasn't been individually muted.

steps.heading: Confirm system-level permissions
steps.body: Open your operating system's notification settings and make sure Slack is authorized to show banners, alerts, and sounds.

steps.heading: Clear the app cache
steps.body: In the Slack desktop app, click Help, go to Troubleshooting, and select 'Clear Cache and Restart' to resolve delivery glitches.

faq.question: Why am I not getting notifications even though preferences look correct?
faq.answer: Check your operating system's own notification permissions, since Slack can be blocked at the OS level even with correct in-app settings.

faq.question: Does clearing the cache delete my messages?
faq.answer: No, clearing the cache only removes locally stored temporary data and doesn't affect your actual message history.

faq.question: Is there a built-in diagnostic tool for mobile notifications?
faq.answer: Yes, the mobile app includes a 'Troubleshoot Notifications' feature that checks your connection settings automatically.

faq.question: Could a browser extension be blocking notifications?
faq.answer: Yes, ad blockers or privacy extensions can sometimes interfere with Slack's web notifications.
